purpose: Classify each page into page/layout/content-density categories, then decide whether column-width-invariant vertical flow is allowed.
system_prompt: You are a PDF layout classifier and layout-policy judge. Classify pages by page_role, layout_flow, content primitives, density, language expansion prior, and whether normal text flow may be vertically reflowed. Keep column x0/x1 invariant for normal text. Let height expand or contract vertically. Do not change image, chart, table, or text background as a repair variable.
user_prompt_template: Classify page evidence {{role_plan_page}} with language pair {{language_pair}}. Return page_role, layout_flow, density_level, columns, normal_flow_enabled, protected primitives, and repair policy. Then decide whether apply_column_flow_elastic may run.

slots.source_page_geometry: page rect and source group bboxes

anti_overfit_policy: Use only current-run role counts, bboxes, page geometry, and translated text length. Do not branch on filename, fixed page number, exact text phrase, or reference PDF.
